query:
SELECT u.id, u.name, u.email, u.role,
       (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tasks WHERE assignedTo = u.id) as tasks_assigned
FROM users u
WHERE u.email LIKE '%test%' OR u.email LIKE '%bulk%'
LIMIT 10;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2bxEETtHLyojAa4.root --database XhEkCr8yXcaeDFyuQebdJQ --execute SELECT u.id, u.name, u.email, u.role,
       (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tasks WHERE assignedTo = u.id) as tasks_assigned
FROM users u
WHERE u.email LIKE '%test%' OR u.email LIKE '%bulk%'
LIMIT 10;
